artifact_role: Historical record of an earlier H0_obs likelihood-fix validation stage.
current_summary: This file records a historical H0_obs likelihood-fix validation stage. Do not quote its historical numerical values as the current manuscript result. Use cosmology/paper_artifacts/final_validation_summary.json, cosmology/results/tierA1_hubble_result_card.json, and cosmology/results/tierA1_chain_component_audit.json for current Tier-A1 values.

corrected_mechanism_definition.issue_fixed: The stale direct local-H0 setup compared the sampled theory-frame H0 parameter instead of the EDCL observed-frame H0_obs quantity.

h0_likelihood_convention.lcdm_local_h0: direct H0.riess2020 is allowed for LCDM
h0_likelihood_convention.edcl_with_local_h0: H0_edcl is required; direct H0.riess2020 is forbidden; derived H0_obs and delta0 are required
h0_likelihood_convention.edcl_no_h0: H0_edcl and direct H0.riess2020 are forbidden
h0_likelihood_convention.stale_edcl_direct_h0_interpretation: configuration failure, not a physics test of the observed-frame mechanism

historical_results_with_fix.note: These values came from an earlier fixed-likelihood validation stage. They are retained only to document the development history and should not be used as the current paper result unless independently reproduced by the current Tier-A1 result card and chain/workdir artifacts.

current_claim_discipline.allowed_current_wording: Tier-A1 supports EDCL activation with the observed-frame local-H0 channel and no-H0 best-fit/profile collapse toward zero. The strict no-H0 posterior-tail q95 criterion is not passed: sampled-density no-H0 fails, and fixed-density same-model no-H0 remains a near-threshold failure. The current result is mechanism-level evidence, not a completed Hubble-tension resolution.
current_claim_discipline.not_allowed_as_current_Tier_A1_claim: EDCL decisively resolves the Hubble tension.
next_required_validations: broader likelihood-sector and fair-baseline ablations beyond the archived BAO/SN checkpoint diagnostics
documented Bayesian-evidence provenance if evidence claims are made

current_noh0_checkpointed_diagnostics_20.claim_boundary: Tier-A1 supports EDCL activation with the observed-frame local-H0 channel and no-H0 best-fit/profile collapse toward zero. The strict no-H0 posterior-tail q95 criterion is not passed: sampled-density no-H0 fails, and fixed-density same-model no-H0 remains a near-threshold failure. The current result is mechanism-level evidence, not a completed Hubble-tension resolution.

bao_sn_diagnostic_ablations.interpretation: best fits near alpha_R=0 but individual likelihood sectors retain broad positive tails
